goal: Locate incoming request authentication and expired-token handling in an unknown monorepo.

surfaceMap.evidence: Hits cluster around API middleware and token utilities.
Middleware paths are cheap structural candidates before full reads.

hypotheses.claim: Request authentication is centralized in API middleware.
Expired-token behavior is implemented in token utilities.

deepDives.finding: authenticate() calls verifyToken() and rejects failed verification with HTTP 401.
verifyToken() raises TokenExpiredError when exp has passed.
The middleware maps TokenExpiredError to 401 with code TOKEN_EXPIRED.

stopCondition.evidence: H1 and H2 confirmed the validation location and expired-token behavior.

deliverable: Authentication is validated in packages/api/middleware/auth.ts through authenticate(). Expired tokens originate in packages/auth/token.ts and return HTTP 401 with code TOKEN_EXPIRED.
risks: Gateway duplicate guard H3 remains open because the goal was resolved before spending the remaining budget.
